briefs.title: Council to consider adding 3 Toyota Tacoma trucks to City fleet via existing contract
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on expanding an existing truck purchase contract by adding 3 more Toyota Tacoma pickup trucks for $174,384, bringing the total contract value to $639,408. No price increase per unit is proposed — the new units would be added at the same rate as the original 8 trucks purchased in 2025.
briefs.action_required: Monitor the February 10, 2026 council decision if your business supplies fleet vehicles or related services to the City.

key_dates.label: Burnaby City Council vote — Toyota Tacoma fleet contract expansion pending approval
